nodes.name: 阿拉胡埃拉省
nodes.summary: 阿拉胡埃拉省是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联4种鸟类，包括Barred becard、Tawny-chested flycatcher、Tawny-capped euphonia等4种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: Tawny-chested flycatcher
nodes.summary: Tawny-chested flycatcher（Tawny-chested flycatcher，学名 Aphanotriccus capitalis），在图谱中标记为易危（VU）物种，已关联6个分布地点节点。

nodes.name: VU
nodes.summary: VU表示 IUCN 易危等级，当前关联694种鸟类，如丹顶鹤、索马里鸵鸟、大斑几维鸟等694种鸟类。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It is found in Costa Rica and previously was also found in Nicaragua

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It is found in Costa Rica and previously was also found in Nicaragua

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The tawny-chested flycatcher is now known only from northeastern Costa Rica, on the Caribbean slope from Alajuela Province south to central Limón Province. There are historical records from near Lake Nicaragua and its outflow the San Juan River, much of which forms the border with Costa Rica. The species inhabits humid mature secondary forest in the upper tropical and subtropical zones
